name: sfhumanesociety.org
message: [AI generated] Founded in 1868, sfhumanesociety.org is associated with the San Francisco Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (SFSPCA). As one of the world's pioneer animal welfare organizations, its mission is to save and protect animals, provide care and treatment, advocate for their welfare, and enhance the human-animal bond. It offers services including animal adoption, veterinary care, and community education.
